message:
Running command: # Only 1 VDDIO in PINS section. But DRT says "multiple pins on bterm VDDIO".
# The issue might be MULTIPLE PORT geometries within the single VDDIO pin def.
# Let's check the full VDDIO pin entry:
python3 -c "
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()
    
for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    if 'VDDIO' in line and 'DIRECTION INOUT' in line:
        # Show 50 lines starting from here
        for j in range(i, min(i+50, len(lines))):
            print(f'{j+1}: {lines[j]}', end='')
            if j > i and lines[j].strip().startswith('- '):
                break
        break
"

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# Only 1 VDDIO in PINS section. But DRT says "multiple pins on bterm VDDIO".
# The issue might be MULTIPLE PORT geometries within the single VDDIO pin def.
# Let's check the full VDDIO pin entry:
python3 -c "
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()
    
for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    if 'VDDIO' in line and 'DIRECTION INOUT' in line:
        # Show 50 lines starting from here
        for j in range(i, min(i+50, len(lines))):
            print(f'{j+1}: {lines[j]}', end='')
            if j > i and lines[j].strip().startswith('- '):
                break
        break
"
